log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Merfolk — Armored Tank (3 attacks).

→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
